title: carex distachya var. distachya
intro: Carex distachya var. distachya, also known as two-horned sedge, is a type of plant in the family Cyperaceae that is native to Asia and Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and arthritis. The health benefits of Carex distachya var. distachya include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a valuable herb for natural remedies. Carex distachya var. distachya can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a powder or infusion to treat various health issues.
